_note: SANITIZED EXAMPLE. The live cron config (real recipients, real prompts) lives in the PRIVATE repo: lyra-private/config/cron-jobs.json. scripts/restore-crons.py reads the private copy and expands ${VAR} placeholders in delivery URLs from the environment (source /root/.openclaw/wa-webhook.env first).

payload.message: Morning digest. Keep context lean. Sections: 1. EMAIL: summarize unread via himalaya. 2. NEWS: run the research script for your topics, save top stories to the News Inbox Notion DB. 3. HEALTH: parse the daily-summary script output. 4. IDEAS: list open content ideas from Notion. Output the digest as your FINAL reply (plain text) — delivery to WhatsApp is automatic; do not call any send/notify tool.

Weekly review. Sections: health summary, competitor news (research script + save to Notion), second-brain synthesis of the week, wiki health. Skip empty sections; never fabricate. Output the review as your FINAL reply — delivery is automatic.

jobs.name: shared-digest-example
jobs._note: Example of delivering one digest to two allowlisted recipients.

payload.message: Daily shared digest for both household members. Query the shared Notion databases and output one digest as your FINAL reply.
